title: Web Data, Fetch, Storage, and Security Boundaries
description: Load and cache public service data while handling hostile input, offline states, privacy, and response failures. Learners cumulatively produce a resilient privacy-aware service-data client through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Use fetch with explicit method, headers, body, status checks, parsing, abort, and failure-state behavior.
Construct and parse URL, URLSearchParams, FormData, and encoded payloads without manual delimiter bugs.
Parse, validate, transform, and serialize JSON while accounting for unsupported values and hostile object shape.
